page_metadata.biotools__summary: CLIN_SKAT is a package within the R programming language to (i) first extract clinically relevant variants (rare and common), followed by (ii) gene-based association analysis by grouping the selected variants.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CLIN_SKAT is a package within the R programming language to (i) first extract clinically relevant variants (rare and common), followed by (ii) gene-based association analysis by grouping the selected variants.
